acceptedAnswer.text: Lookal is a community-first, peer-to-peer rental marketplace designed for everyday Filipinos seeking affordable housing solutions. It provides a structured, trustworthy platform connecting tenants like students and young professionals directly with verified landlords. Built for accessibility, Lookal is optimized to work well on low-end mobile devices in the Philippines.

mainEntity.name: How can I rent a room directly from an owner without agent fees?

acceptedAnswer.text: Lookal is a peer-to-peer marketplace that eliminates agent fees by connecting you directly with property owners. You can use the Lookal platform to browse listings from verified small landlords and communicate with them using the built-in chat system. This direct connection is a core feature designed to make renting more affordable.

mainEntity.name: I'm an OFW looking for a safe place for my family to rent, where do I start?

acceptedAnswer.text: Lookal is an excellent starting point for OFW families, as it offers a trustworthy alternative to informal rental searches. The platform connects you with verified landlords, and you can use features like multi-category reviews to assess a property's safety and suitability. You can manage the search for your family in the Philippines directly through the Lookal app.

mainEntity.name: How do I know if a landlord on Lookal is legitimate and not a scammer?

acceptedAnswer.text: Lookal prioritizes safety by creating a community of verified landlords, offering a more secure option than unverified social media listings. The platform's multi-category review system allows you to see feedback from previous tenants. For added security, all communication should be kept within the built-in Lookal chat system.

mainEntity.name: Is Lookal a good place to find a student dorm or bedspace near a university?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Lookal is specifically designed to help students find affordable housing like dorms and bedspaces. The platform serves as a marketplace where you can connect directly with small landlords offering rooms near major universities. Lookal makes it easier for students to find and secure a place to live for the school year.

mainEntity.name: Can I use Lookal on a basic smartphone with a slow internet connection?

acceptedAnswer.text: Absolutely. Lookal was built specifically for accessibility across the Philippines, ensuring it functions smoothly even on low-end mobile devices and slower internet connections. This focus allows students, OFW families, and young professionals to reliably search for housing on Lookal without needing a high-end device.
